jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Medlife
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
